parsed_review.summary: CP00-663 (RP21 Admin Console review readiness bridge, Risk C, 150 units RP21.P08.M06.S18-RP21.P09.M07.S02) is a descriptor-only closeout slice that correctly does NOT overclaim production readiness: manifest production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status=in_progress; command-evidence production_ready=false/writes_product_state=false/no_real_data=true; construction-inspection verdict=PENDING_REVIEW; adjudication pending. The production_ready_flag (admin_console_review_readiness_bridge_descriptor_verified) is a descriptor-verification marker finalized only after this review. [Directly verified by Read/Grep] (1) Deliverable/phase/micro-title distributions in registry.js ADMIN_CONSOLE_CP663_REQUIREMENTS match the prompt exactly and sum to 150 (impl 63, test 9, hermes 38, claude 21, security 14, ui 5; P08 73 + P09 77). (2) service.js CP663 builders are pure frozen-object constructors; freezeCp663Result stamps no_real_data=true, synthetic_only=true, writes_product_state=false and all runtime flags false. (3) validators.js validateAdminConsoleCp663ReviewReadinessBridgeDescriptor enforces descriptor_only/runtime_execution=false/raw_payload_included=false per row, no-leak guards, ~33 false runtime-write flags, real_*_data_loaded=false, and promotes_claude_to_final_approval!==false (line 3333). (4) model.test.js:1412-1470 asserts coverage, descriptor-only boundaries, Claude read_only, blocks_pack_on_p0_p1_p2, handoff to CP00-664. (5) Contract projection current_pack/cp663_no_write_attestation/cp663_closeout_handoff and validate-rp21-admin-console-contract.mjs deep-equal checks are consistent; top-level runtime_opened=false. Authority boundary holds: Claude is read-only (Read,Grep,Glob; forbidden_tools_present=false), not final approver; claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false; Hermes used only for deterministic evidence packet/receipt labeling with hermes_runtime_opened/emits_hermes_runtime_receipt/executes_hermes_command_runtime all false. Review-evidence hardening: readiness auth_preflight passed (exit 0, 1434-byte valid JSON, no tool-call/fenced-prose shape). [Reported, not re-run by me] The 22-command validation matrix in command-evidence.json (closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack validate, rp21:admin-console:validate, npm test, validate, spec/weighted/fullplan/goal/rp00 validators, git diff --check, build) all report exit 0; I independently confirmed the source consistency those commands assert. One non-blocking P3 observation noted. No P0/P1/P2 findings; pack closeout and this CP closeout goal are not blocked. Human final approval for any enterprise-trust claim remains outside this receipt by design.

findings.title: changed-file-scope.json dual-lists unrelated handoff doc as untracked implementation and preserved-unrelated
findings.details: docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md appears in both untracked_implementation_files (line 176) and unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (line 184). The authoritative pack scope active_pack_required_untracked_files lists only the five docs/closeout-packs/cp00-663/ artifacts and excludes the handoff doc, and active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted is empty, so the unrelated file is not attributed to CP00-663. The overlap is cosmetic and may be by design (the field captures untracked files under plan/impl paths while the preserved list is the explicit exclusion). It does not affect pack scope integrity, the no-write/no-real-data boundary, or closeout eligibility.
findings.recommendation: Optionally exclude files already enumerated in unrelated_dirty_files_preserved from untracked_implementation_files in the scope generator for clarity. No action required before CP00-663 closeout.
findings.post_review_disposition: Non-blocking informational; authoritative pack scope (active_pack_required_untracked_files) is correct and active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted is empty. Does not gate pack or goal closeout.
